name: gnomeethyst
description: Amethyst-style dynamic tiling for GNOME Shell.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:schema
scripts.build:schema: mkdir -p dist/schemas && cp schemas/*.xml dist/schemas/ && glib-compile-schemas dist/schemas
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.install:extension: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/gnomeethyst@local && cp -r dist/* ~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/gnomeethyst@local/
scripts.pack: npm run build && cd dist && gnome-extensions pack --force
